max_tokens.title: Max Tokens
max_tokens.description: Maximum number of completion tokens to generate

model.title: Model
model.description: Model to use, for example, sonar-pro

stream.title: Stream
stream.description: If true, returns streaming SSE response

stop.title: Stop
stop.description: Stop sequences. Generation stops when one of these strings is produced

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: Controls randomness in the response. Higher values make output more random. Range: 0-2

top_p.title: Top P
top_p.description: Nucleus sampling parameter. Controls diversity via nucleus sampling

response_format.title: Response Format
response_format.description: Optional. Controls the output format. Omit for default text output. Set `type` to `json_schema` for structured output.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: Array of messages forming the conversation history

search_mode.title: Search Mode
search_mode.description: Source of search results (web, academic, or sec)

return_images.title: Return Images
return_images.description: When true, include image results in the response

return_related_questions.title: Return Related Questions
return_related_questions.description: When true, generates suggested follow-up queries based on the search results

enable_search_classifier.title: Enable Search Classifier
enable_search_classifier.description: When true, uses a classifier to determine if web search is needed for the query

disable_search.title: Disable Search
disable_search.description: When true, disables all web search capabilities. The model responds based solely on its training data

search_domain_filter.title: Search Domain Filter
search_domain_filter.description: Limit search results to specific domains (e.g. github.com, wikipedia.org)

search_language_filter.title: Search Language Filter
search_language_filter.description: Filter results by language using ISO 639-1 codes (e.g. en, fr, de)

search_recency_filter.title: Search Recency Filter
search_recency_filter.description: Filter by publication recency (hour, day, week, month, or year)

search_after_date_filter.title: Search After Date Filter
search_after_date_filter.description: Return results published after this date (MM/DD/YYYY)

search_before_date_filter.title: Search Before Date Filter
search_before_date_filter.description: Return results published before this date (MM/DD/YYYY)

last_updated_before_filter.title: Last Updated Before Filter
last_updated_before_filter.description: Return results last updated before this date (MM/DD/YYYY)

last_updated_after_filter.title: Last Updated After Filter
last_updated_after_filter.description: Return results last updated after this date (MM/DD/YYYY)

image_format_filter.title: Image Format Filter
image_format_filter.description: Filter image results by format (e.g. png, jpg)

image_domain_filter.title: Image Domain Filter
image_domain_filter.description: Limit image results to specific domains

stream_mode.title: Stream Mode
stream_mode.description: Controls the format of streaming events. 'full' suppresses reasoning events and includes metadata inline; 'concise' emits reasoning events separately

reasoning_effort.title: Reasoning Effort
reasoning_effort.description: Controls how much effort the model spends on reasoning

language_preference.title: Language Preference
language_preference.description: ISO 639-1 language code for preferred response language
